topic: OpenAI Codex Cloud Agent Guide 2026: Autonomous GitHub PR Generation

competitors.title: OpenAI Codex Guide — AI Coding Agent in ChatGPT (2026)
key_points: OpenAI Codex (2026) is an autonomous cloud-based coding agent built directly into ChatGPT
Async workflow: describe task → Codex clones repo into sandboxed cloud → writes code across files → runs tests → opens PR
Powered by o3/o4-mini reasoning models, integrates with GitHub for PR workflow
Designed for background task delegation vs real-time interaction
Provides security via network-isolated sandbox, no internet access during execution

competitors.title: OpenAI Codex vs GitHub Copilot vs Claude Code (2026)
key_points: Codex confusion problem: original Codex model (2021) vs new Codex agent (2026)
Head-to-head comparison table: Codex Agent (async/cloud) vs GitHub Copilot (real-time IDE) vs Claude Code (interactive terminal)
Pricing breakdown in 2026: Codex via ChatGPT Pro ($200/month) or API, Copilot ~$10/month, Claude Code via Claude Pro or API
Security considerations differ: Copilot has mature enterprise controls, Codex uses cloud sandbox, Claude Code executes locally
Decision framework based on workflow: IDE-first → Copilot, terminal-first → Claude Code, async delegation → Codex

competitors.title: OpenAI Codex Statistics 2026: Key Numbers, Data & Facts
key_points: 74,468 GitHub stars, 14.0M npm downloads (last 30 days), 3M weekly active users (April 8, 2026)
Rewritten from TypeScript to Rust in June 2025, 696 total releases, Apache 2.0 license
GPT-5.3-Codex scores 77.3% on Terminal-Bench and 56.8% on SWE-bench Pro
OpenAI valued at $852B (March 2026), $24-25B ARR, $122B latest funding round
Token-based pricing shift in April 2026, desktop app with 1M+ downloads

stats.fact: OpenAI Codex CLI has 74,468 GitHub stars and 14.0M npm downloads (last 30 days)
3M weekly active users as of April 8, 2026 (confirmed by Sam Altman)
GPT-5.3-Codex scores 77.3% on Terminal-Bench and 56.8% on SWE-bench Pro
Codex agent is included in ChatGPT Pro at $200/month, no separate API setup required
The original Codex model was deprecated in March 2023, current Codex (2026) is architecturally unrelated
